hero.description: Speak with Dr. Jyotika Kanwar, MD Psychiatry, for confidential online consultations focused on your mental health, emotional wellbeing, and recovery.

support.title: Care for your mental health, at every stage.
support.description: Mental health concerns can feel overwhelming, but the right support can make recovery possible. Dr. Jyotika offers structured psychiatric consultations, diagnosis, treatment planning, and follow-up care tailored to your needs.

cards.title: Anxiety & Panic
cards.description: For excessive worry, panic attacks, restlessness, overthinking, physical anxiety symptoms, and difficulty relaxing.

cards.title: Depression & Mood Concerns
cards.description:
For persistent sadness, low motivation, hopelessness, irritability, mood swings, and loss of interest.
Compassionate psychiatric care to understand your symptoms, identify the underlying concerns, and begin a structured path toward recovery.

cards.title: Stress, Sleep & Burnout
cards.description:
For work stress, emotional exhaustion, poor sleep, fatigue, and feeling mentally drained.
Support for stress-related concerns with practical, medical, and therapeutic guidance to help restore balance.

cards.title: Addiction & Substance Use
cards.description:
For alcohol, nicotine, cannabis, prescription medication misuse, or other substance-related concerns.
Non-judgmental support for understanding dependence, managing cravings, preventing relapse, and planning safe recovery.

cards.title: Child & Adolescent Concerns
cards.description:
For attention issues, behavioral concerns, emotional difficulties, anxiety, academic stress, and parent guidance.
Structured psychiatric evaluation and guidance for children, teenagers, and families.

cards.title: Psychiatric Emergencies & Risk Assessment
cards.description:
For severe distress, self-harm thoughts, suicidal thoughts, agitation, or sudden behavioral changes.
Clinical assessment and guidance for urgent mental health concerns, with clear next steps for safety and care.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.description: Simple, private, and convenient online care.

steps.title: Book Your Slot
steps.description: Choose a suitable consultation time and share basic details securely.

steps.title: Join Online Consultation
steps.description: Connect with Dr. Jyotika through a private video consultation from your home.

steps.title: Receive a Care Plan
steps.description: Get a diagnosis-focused assessment, treatment plan, prescription if needed, and follow-up guidance.

newsletter.title: Take the first step toward feeling better.
newsletter.description: Connect with Dr. Jyotika Kanwar for private online psychiatric consultation and personalized treatment guidance.

bookingSuccess.subtitle: Your consultation has been successfully booked. You will receive the meeting link via email / WhatsApp.

bookingFailed.title: Payment Failed
bookingFailed.body: Your payment could not be completed. Don't worry — your appointment slot is still temporarily held.
bookingFailed.troubleshootBody: Please check your internet connection or contact your bank if the issue persists. No charges have been made to your account.
